infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to the camera to capture photos for content creation.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to the microphone to record audio for voice synthesis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to save and share your created content.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: This app needs access to contacts for sharing features.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow AuraGen AI to access your camera to capture photos for content creation.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow AuraGen AI to access your photos to save and share your created content.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow AuraGen AI to save photos to your device.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow AuraGen AI to access your microphone to record audio for voice synthesis.
